title: Emissive Ores labPBR
description: Emissive ores for shaders using labPBR ✨ Cobblemon, Create, Mekanism, Spelunkery compatible !
body:
This resource pack makes ores emissive by changing the specular texture

**It works only when using shaders**

> It does work fine with default [Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones) placed below in the resource pack list
> 
> You can get a Bare Bones PBR version of this pack [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-emissive-ores-labpbr) !

Why this resource pack ?
- Because most of emissive ores resource pack doesn't work with shaders

-----------
Compatible mods list :
- Create
- Cobblemon
- Mekanism
- Spelunkery



*Don't hesitate to contact me if you want other ores to be added in the resource pack*
